description_long: This object is a collection of eleven distinct swords, each featuring a unique blade and hilt design. The blades vary in length and shape, with some being straight and others slightly curved, and all are rendered in a dark, matte finish. The hilts are ornate, with elaborate crossguards and pommels, some featuring pointed or wing-like extensions. The overall aesthetic is gothic or fantasy-inspired, with intricate details on the handles and guards. The swords are arranged side by side, showcasing the diversity in their forms, from broad, heavy blades to slender, elegant ones. No visible ornamentation such as jewels or engravings is present, and the set appears to be made entirely of metal.
description: A set of eleven dark, intricately designed swords with varied blade shapes and ornate hilts, all in a matte finish. The collection features both straight and curved blades with elaborate crossguards.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eleven swords side by side, highlighting the diversity in blade shapes and ornate hilts.
description_view_1: Edge-on view of a single sword, emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the profile of the crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view of the swords, mirroring the front but with less detail visible on the hilts and guards.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the slim profile of a single sword.
attribute_blade_type: mixed straight and curved, double-edged, pointed
attribute_handle_design: ornate, straight and contoured handles with decorative crossguards and pommels, all in dark metal
